name: Snowflake
description: Six-spoke flakes spinning to a new angle on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(46% 6%, 54% 6%, 54% 94%, 46% 94%); clip-path: polygon(46% 6%, 54% 6%, 54% 94%, 46% 94%); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(46% 6%, 54% 6%, 54% 94%, 46% 94%); clip-path: polygon(46% 6%, 54% 6%, 54% 94%, 46% 94%); -webkit-transform: rotate(60deg); transform: rotate(60deg); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(46% 6%, 54% 6%, 54% 94%, 46% 94%); clip-path: polygon(46% 6%, 54% 6%, 54% 94%, 46% 94%); -webkit-transform: rotate(120deg); transform: rotate(120deg); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
